name: VideoMemory
description: Adds VideoMemory skill packaging and future onboarding/runtime integration to OpenClaw.

videomemoryBaseUrl.description: Preferred VideoMemory base URL for skill prompts and future plugin-managed routing.

repoDir.description: Local VideoMemory checkout path used by bootstrap and relaunch flows.

repoRef.description: Preferred git ref when the plugin installs or relaunches VideoMemory.

botId.description: bot_id written into helper-managed VideoMemory tasks.

tailscaleAuthKeyEnvVar.description: Environment variable name that contains a reusable Tailscale auth key for onboarding.
